input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.6.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.6.5
            TITLE: the precharge relay must be a mechanical type relay

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.6.5: The precharge relay must be a mechanical type relay
EV.5.6.5 The precharge relay must be a mechanical type relay

final_answer: The precharge relay must be a mechanical type relay
